required_pattern: Oshima or other B_ardens regime is intermediate in flower size between mainland large Bombus and non-Bombus islands
invalidating_pattern: B_ardens regime is not intermediate or non-Bombus islands are not smaller

required_pattern: non-Bombus islands have lower outcrossing or higher bagged self seed set than Bombus islands
invalidating_pattern: non-Bombus islands remain as outcrossed as Bombus islands

required_pattern: guide or spot metric declines after Bombus loss on island-resolved common scale
invalidating_pattern: guide metric does not decline or increases after Bombus loss

required_pattern: pollinator hierarchy explains residual pattern not matched by climate-only ranking
invalidating_pattern: climate-only ranking matches all observed channels as well as hierarchy
decision: interaction not needed for current channels

required_pattern: pollinator hierarchy explains residual pattern not matched by simple island-order isolation
invalidating_pattern: isolation order matches all observed channels as well as hierarchy
decision: interaction not needed for current channels

required_pattern: selfed progeny or selfing-dominated islands show later survival or fitness cost
invalidating_pattern: no late cost is detected under comparable assay
